referencedTypes.description:
The **`MouseEvent`** interface represents events that occur due to the user interacting with a pointing device (such as a mouse). Common events using this interface include click, dblclick, mouseup, mousedown.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/MouseEvent)

props.description: Props for the toolbar link component.

members.name: to
members.description: Route Location the link should navigate to when clicked on.

referencedTypes.name: RouteLocationRaw
referencedTypes.description: Route location that can be passed to `router.push()` and other user-facing APIs.
typeParameters: Name extends keyof RouteMap = keyof RouteMap

members.name: replace
members.description: Calls `router.replace` instead of `router.push`.

members.name: href
members.description: The URL the link should navigate to when clicked on.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, the link is disabled.

members.name: activeClass
members.description: Class to apply when the link is active

members.name: exactActiveClass
members.description: Class to apply when the link is exact active

members.name: inactiveClass
members.description: The class to apply to the link when it is inactive.

members.name: prefetchedClass
members.description: A class to apply to links that have been prefetched.

members.name: external
members.description: Forces the link to be considered as external (true) or internal (false). This is helpful to handle edge-cases

members.name: ariaCurrentValue
members.description: Value passed to the attribute `aria-current` when the link is exact active.

members.name: viewTransition
members.description: Pass the returned promise of `router.push()` to `document.startViewTransition()` if supported.

members.name: target
members.description: Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context.

members.name: rel
members.description: A rel attribute value to apply on the link. Defaults to "noopener noreferrer" for external links.

members.name: noRel
members.description: If set to true, no rel attribute will be added to the link

members.name: prefetch
members.description: When enabled will prefetch middleware, layouts and payloads of links in the viewport.

members.name: prefetchOn
members.description: Allows controlling when to prefetch links. By default, prefetch is triggered only on visibility.

members.name: noPrefetch
members.description: Escape hatch to disable `prefetch` attribute.

members.name: trailingSlash
members.description:
An option to either add or remove trailing slashes in the `href` for this specific link.
Overrides the global `trailingSlash` option if provided.

props.name: ToolbarToggleGroupProps
props.resolvedType: { rovingFocus?: boolean; disabled?: boolean; orientation?: DataOrientation; dir?: Direction; loop?: boolean; modelValue?: (M extends true ? T[] : T); defaultValue?: (M extends true ? T[] : T); multiple?: M; clearable?: boolean; selectionBehavior?: SelectionBehavior; name?: string; required?: boolean; asChild?: boolean; as?: AsTag | Component }
props.description: Props for the toolbar toggle group component.

members.name: rovingFocus
members.description: When `false`, navigating through items with arrow keys is disabled.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, prevents interaction with all items in the group.

members.name: orientation
members.description: The orientation of the component.

members.name: dir
members.description: The reading direction of the group when applicable.

members.name: loop
members.description: When `true`, keyboard navigation loops from last to first item, and vice versa.

members.name: modelValue
members.description:
The controlled value of the selected item(s).

Use this when you need to control the state of the items. Can be bound with `v-model`

members.name: defaultValue
members.description:
The default value of the selected item(s).

Use this when you need to set the initial state of the items.

members.name: multiple
members.description:
Determines whether a "single" or "multiple" items can be selected at a time.

This prop will overwrite the inferred type from `modelValue` and `defaultValue`.

members.name: clearable
members.description: Whether selected item can be cleared when `multiple` is false.

members.name: selectionBehavior
members.description: How multiple selection should behave in the collection.

members.name: name
members.description: The name of the field. Submitted with its owning form as part of a name/value pair.

members.name: required
members.description: When `true`, indicates that the user must set the value before the owning form can be submitted.

members.name: asChild
members.description: Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

members.name: as
members.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwrite by `asChild`
